seoTitle: How to Redirect a Domain to Another Domain in Namecheap
metaDescription: See how to redirect a domain to another site in Namecheap, choose between 301 and 302 redirects, and send visitors to the right page instantly.
intro: Whether you're rebranding, running a promotion, or consolidating multiple web addresses, Namecheap lets you redirect one domain straight to another without touching your hosting. This guide covers setting up a URL redirect from the Namecheap dashboard and choosing between a permanent 301 or temporary 302 redirect. By the end, visitors typing your old domain will land exactly where you want them, with no downtime.

steps.heading: Log in to your Namecheap account
steps.body: Sign in and open the Domain List to see all the domains registered under your account.

steps.heading: Open the domain's management page
steps.body: Click Manage next to the domain you want to redirect, which brings up its Advanced DNS and redirect options.

steps.heading: Set up URL redirect or forwarding
steps.body: Find the redirect or URL forwarding section and enter the destination URL you want the domain to point to.

steps.heading: Choose 301 or 302 redirect type
steps.body: Pick a permanent 301 redirect if the move is final, or a temporary 302 redirect if you're only forwarding traffic for a limited time, like a promotion.

steps.heading: Save and test the redirect
steps.body: Save your changes, then visit the domain in a browser to confirm it forwards correctly to the new destination.

faq.question: What's the difference between a 301 and 302 redirect in Namecheap?
faq.answer: A 301 redirect tells browsers and search engines the move is permanent, while a 302 signals it's temporary and the original domain may be used again later.

faq.question: Will redirecting my domain affect my SEO rankings?
faq.answer: A 301 redirect generally passes on most of the original page's search value to the new destination, while a 302 does not transfer ranking signals the same way.

faq.question: How long does it take for a Namecheap redirect to start working?
faq.answer: Once saved, redirects can take a short time to propagate, similar to other DNS changes, so give it a few minutes before testing.

faq.question: Can I redirect a domain without hosting?
faq.answer: Yes, Namecheap's URL forwarding works independently of hosting since it just tells browsers where to send visitors when they type your domain.
